title: Louie's Origins: Aetherian
description: An Origins addon that adds the Aetherian - A strange and otherworldly race.
body:
# The Aetherian descends!

## Become a child of the skies.
A lightweight Origins add-on that adds the Aetherian—a celestial, Aasimar-inspired origin designed to pair naturally with The Aether. Start your adventure among floating isles, drift like a feather, and draw strength from sunlight—yet find your power dimmed in starless realms.

## Features

### Start in the Aether
Spawns new Aetherians in aether:the_aether (Blazeborn-style spawn power).

### Heavenly Descent
Built-in slow-fall and no fall damage for smooth aerial traversal.

### Solar Grace
Move 15% faster in direct sunlight for a breezy, daytime momentum boost.

### Starless Weakness
Reduced movement speed and attack damage in the Nether and End—the sky’s favor fades where light is absent.

### Skybound Step
Double jump for mid-air corrections and stylish leaps. Includes a small HUD pip and a safe fallback activation.


### Why this exists

I couldn't for an origin that feels like Enderian/Blazeborn in structure but Aasimar-flavored and tuned for The Aether. So, I created it! This add-on aims to be tiny, readable, and drop-in friendly for Fabric 1.20.1 modpacks.

## Requirements

Minecraft: 1.20.1
Fabric Loader + Fabric API
Origins
The Aether (for the Aether dimension)

Works fine alongside common RPG stacks (Better Combat, PlayerEx/Data Attributes, YUNG’s structures, etc.).

## Configuration & Balance
All powers are data-driven (JSON). If you want different numbers:
Sunlight speed bonus (+15%)
Nether/End penalties (−15% speed, −20% attack)
Double-jump cooldown (20 ticks)

## Compatibility Notes

Spawn behavior follows Blazeborn’s approach (origins:modify_player_spawn), so it applies on first spawn in new worlds.


## FAQ

Q: I didn’t spawn in the Aether.
A: Spawn powers apply on first spawn in a new world. If testing in an existing save, re-pick the origin with an Orb of Origin or start a new world.

Q: Can you add [X] ability?
A: I don't really want to continue working on this. This is mostly for a server I'm maintaining!
